seoTitle: How to Add Tags in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to add tags to tickets in Freshdesk so you can organize, filter, and report on support requests more easily.
intro: Tags make it easy to categorize tickets beyond the default fields, helping your team filter and report on recurring themes. This guide shows how to add tags to a ticket in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open the ticket
steps.body: Go to the ticket you want to tag from your Freshdesk dashboard.

steps.heading: Find the tags field
steps.body: Locate the tags section, usually found in the ticket properties panel.

steps.heading: Add a new tag or select an existing one
steps.body: Type a new tag name or choose from previously used tags to keep naming consistent.

steps.heading: Save the ticket
steps.body: Confirm the tag is applied by saving, and it will now show up in filtered views and reports.

faq.question: Can I add multiple tags to one ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply as many relevant tags as needed to a single ticket.

faq.question: Can I filter tickets by tag?
faq.answer: Yes, tags can be used as a filter in your ticket views and reports.

faq.question: Do tags affect ticket routing?
faq.answer: Tags themselves don't automatically route tickets, but they can be used in automation rules to trigger actions.

faq.question: Can customers see the tags on their ticket?
faq.answer: Tags are typically internal and not visible to customers on the portal.
